steps.title: Factor out common term
steps.content:
Both terms have the common factor $x+7$. Factor it out:
$$\left(x + 7\right)\left(\frac{1}{3} - \frac{1}{2}\right) = -8$$.
Simplify the coefficients: $\frac{1}{3} - \frac{1}{2} = -\frac{1}{6}$.
Resulting in: $$-\frac{1}{6}(x+7) = -8$$.

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $-6$:
$$x + 7 = 48$$.
Subtract \$7$ from both sides:
$$x = 41$$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
